rag_rules: Place input assumptions in component type annexes using `assume "label": expression;` syntax
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts in component type scopes
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts
Declare helper equations with explicit types using `eq name : type = expression;`
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in type-level contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` for input assumptions and `guarantee "label": expression;` for output guarantees
Place AGREE annex content inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicit typed ports or constants are available
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
